title: Blocks Pixelated
description: Resource pack that transforms most of 3D rendered blocks and other block-like items (in inventory) into their respective pixelated variants.
body:
## Blocks Pixelated

This resource pack transforms most of 3D rendered blocks and other block-like items (in inventory) into their respective pixelated variants to enhance your Minecraft experience. All textures were carefully remade and inspired by original actual in-game blocks. Hope you will like this creation. _Enjoy!_

![New v1.1 Update Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a67caf5d7195b5b7ac361fdfc00e81f4a6c2ff9_0.webp)

⚠️⚠️⚠️

**!!!Please DO NOT download** versions which states as **deprecated** anymore (marked with **D** in version number) but rather download other versions!!!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9ti_RFb6k_c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

👀 1.21.4 support soon!

_**==📢DISCORD SERVER (TEST)📢==**_

All the feedback, questions, suggestions can go into this server:
[https://discord.gg/BdxuyD7ZwU](https://discord.gg/BdxuyD7ZwU)

**Features:**
- 830+ new hand-made textures (as of 1.21)
- animated textures for waxed copper blocks and infested blocks
- custom mob head textures
- compatible with Minecraft 1.20, 1.21
- compatible with Optifine
- Optifine features (see below)
- and more

**Optifine Features:**
- coloured paintings (in inventory) to help you distinguish particular paintings

_Tip: If you dont see it in game try the latest version of resource pack._

My YouTube channel:
[https://www.youtube.com/@cat_metalhead](https://www.youtube.com/@cat_metalhead)

**Istallation:**
1. Download resource pack.
1. Open directory you set to download pack to.
1. Copy the resource pack.
1. Run Minecraft.
1. Navigate to Options > Resource packs.
1. Click "Open Pack Folder".
1. Paste the copied resource pack.
1. Enjoy!
